title: cyclosorus calcaratus
intro: Cyclosorus calcaratus is a species of fern, specifically a type of tropical or subtropical fern belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which may help reduce inflammation and lower body temperature, making it a potential natural remedy for several health benefits. Cyclosorus calcaratus is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
